response:
A disk space alert occurred on the prod-db-01 production database at 2AM Saturday; automated cleanup freed 40GB but failed to resolve the issue fully, requiring manual on-call intervention at 8AM to restore service with no customer impact as the incident took place during a maintenance window.
The root cause of the incident was traced to misconfigured log rotation following a recent system migration, and no specific follow-up action items are outlined in this on-call incident report.
